title: Sagitta latifolia
intro: The plant Sagitta latifolia, also known as Chinese angelica or Dong quai, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Sagitta latifolia include its ability to regulate menstrual cycles, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate menopausal symptoms, making it a popular remedy for women's health issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include ferulic acid, coumarins, and polyacetylenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Sagitta latifolia include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including anemia, insomnia, and digestive problems.
